title: pseudocalymma sagotii var. macrocalyx
intro: Pseudocalymma sagotii var. macrocalyx, commonly known as the African bush willow, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapotaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pseudocalymma sagotii var. macrocalyx include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce pain, and aid in the treatment of various infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, and it is often used in combination with other plants in traditional African medicine.
